en: There is therefore now no condemnation for those who are in Christ Jesus.
zh: 所以現在，那些在耶穌基督裡的人就不被定罪了；

en: For the law of the Spirit of life has set you free in Christ Jesus from the law of sin and death.
zh: 因為生命之靈的律在基督耶穌裡使我自由，脫離了罪和死的律。

en: For God has done what the law, weakened by the flesh, could not do. By sending his own Son in the likeness of sinful flesh and for sin, he condemned sin in the flesh,
zh: 律法是因肉體而軟弱無力，所作不到的， 神作到了：他差遣自己的兒子成為罪身的樣式，為了除掉罪，就在肉體中把罪判決了，

en: in order that the righteous requirement of the law might be fulfilled in us, who walk not according to the flesh but according to the Spirit.
zh: 使律法所要求的義，可以在我們這些不隨從肉體而隨從聖靈去行的人身上實現出來。

en: For those who live according to the flesh set their minds on the things of the flesh, but those who live according to the Spirit set their minds on the things of the Spirit.
zh: 隨從肉體的人，以肉體的事為念；隨從聖靈的人，以聖靈的事為念。

en: To set the mind on the flesh is death, but to set the mind on the Spirit is life and peace.
zh: 以肉體為念就是死，以聖靈為念就是生命、平安；

en: For the mind that is set on the flesh is hostile to God, for it does not submit to God's law; indeed, it cannot.
zh: 因為以肉體為念就是與 神為仇，既不服從 神的律法，也的確不能夠服從；

en: Those who are in the flesh cannot please God.
zh: 屬肉體的人不能得 神的喜悅。

en: You, however, are not in the flesh but in the Spirit, if in fact the Spirit of God dwells in you. Anyone who does not have the Spirit of Christ does not belong to him.
zh: 神的靈既然住在你們裡面，你們就不是屬於肉體，而是屬於聖靈的了。如果人沒有基督的靈，就不是屬於基督的。

en: But if Christ is in you, although the body is dead because of sin, the Spirit is life because of righteousness.
zh: 基督若在你們裡面，你們的身體因著罪的緣故是死的，而聖靈卻因著義的緣故賜給你們生命。

en: If the Spirit of him who raised Jesus from the dead dwells in you, he who raised Christ Jesus from the dead will also give life to your mortal bodies through his Spirit who dwells in you.
zh: 如果那使耶穌從死人中復活者的靈住在你們裡面，那使基督從死人中復活的，也必藉著住在你們裡面的聖靈，使你們必死的身體活過來。

en: So then, brothers, we are debtors, not to the flesh, to live according to the flesh.
zh: 弟兄們，可見我們並不是欠肉體的債，隨著肉體而活。

en: For if you live according to the flesh you will die, but if by the Spirit you put to death the deeds of the body, you will live.
zh: 如果隨著肉體而活，你們必定死；如果靠著聖靈治死身體的惡行，你們就必活著。

en: For all who are led by the Spirit of God are sons of God.
zh: 因為蒙 神的靈引導的，都是 神的兒子。

en: For you did not receive the spirit of slavery to fall back into fear, but you have received the Spirit of adoption as sons, by whom we cry, "Abba! Father!"
zh: 你們接受的，不是奴僕的靈，使你們仍舊懼怕；你們接受的，是使人成為嗣子的靈，使我們呼叫“阿爸、父”。

en: The Spirit himself bears witness with our spirit that we are children of God,
zh: 聖靈親自和我們的靈一同證明我們是 神的兒女。

en: and if children, then heirs- heirs of God and fellow heirs with Christ, provided we suffer with him in order that we may also be glorified with him.
zh: 既然是兒女，就是後嗣；是 神的後嗣，也和基督一同作後嗣。我們既然和他一同受苦，就必和他一同得榮耀。

en: For I consider that the sufferings of this present time are not worth comparing with the glory that is to be revealed to us.
zh: 我看現在的苦難，與將要向我們顯出的榮耀，是無法相比的。

en: For the creation waits with eager longing for the revealing of the sons of God.
zh: 被造的萬物都熱切渴望 神的眾子顯現出來。

en: For the creation was subjected to futility, not willingly, but because of him who subjected it, in hope
zh: 因為被造的萬物服在虛空之下，不是自己願意這樣，而是由於使它屈服的那一位；

en: that the creation itself will be set free from its bondage to decay and obtain the freedom of the glory of the children of God.
zh: 被造的萬物盼望自己得著釋放，脫離敗壞的奴役，得著 神兒女榮耀的自由。

en: For we know that the whole creation has been groaning together in the pains of childbirth until now.
zh: 我們知道被造的萬物直到現在都一同在痛苦呻吟。

en: And not only the creation, but we ourselves, who have the firstfruits of the Spirit, groan inwardly as we wait eagerly for adoption as sons, the redemption of our bodies.
zh: 不但這樣，連我們這些有聖靈作為初熟果子的人，自己也在內心歎息，熱切期待成為嗣子，就是我們的身體得贖。

en: For in this hope we were saved. Now hope that is seen is not hope. For who hopes for what he sees?
zh: 我們得救時就存著這盼望；但是看得見的盼望不是盼望，因為誰會盼望自己看見了的呢？

en: But if we hope for what we do not see, we wait for it with patience.
zh: 但如果我們盼望沒有看見的，就會耐心地熱切期待。

en: Likewise the Spirit helps us in our weakness. For we do not know what to pray for as we ought, but the Spirit himself intercedes for us with groanings too deep for words.
zh: 照樣，聖靈也在我們的軟弱上幫助我們。原來我們不曉得應當怎樣禱告，但聖靈親自用不可言喻的歎息，替我們祈求。

en: And he who searches hearts knows what is the mind of the Spirit, because the Spirit intercedes for the saints according to the will of God.
zh: 那鑒察人心的，曉得聖靈的心意，因為聖靈照著 神的旨意替聖徒祈求。

en: And we know that for those who love God all things work together for good, for those who are called according to his purpose.
zh: 我們知道，為了愛 神的人，就是按他旨意蒙召的人的益處，萬事都一同效力。

en: For those whom he foreknew he also predestined to be conformed to the image of his Son, in order that he might be the firstborn among many brothers.
zh: 因為 神預先知道的人，他就預先命定他們和他兒子的形象一模一樣，使他的兒子在許多弟兄中作長子，

en: And those whom he predestined he also called, and those whom he called he also justified, and those whom he justified he also glorified.
zh: 他預先命定的人，又呼召他們；所召來的人，又稱他們為義；所稱為義的人，又使他們得榮耀。

en: What then shall we say to these things? If God is for us, who can be against us?
zh: 既是這樣，我們對這一切還有甚麼話說呢？ 神若這樣為我們，誰能敵對我們呢？

en: He who did not spare his own Son but gave him up for us all, how will he not also with him graciously give us all things?
zh: 他連自己的兒子都捨得，為我們眾人把他交出來，難道不也把萬有和他一同白白地賜給我們嗎？

en: Who shall bring any charge against God's elect? It is God who justifies.
zh: 誰能控告 神揀選的人呢？有 神稱我們為義了。

en: Who is to condemn? Christ Jesus is the one who died- more than that, who was raised- who is at the right hand of God, who indeed is interceding for us.
zh: 誰能定我們的罪呢？有基督耶穌死了，而且復活了，現今在 神的右邊，也替我們祈求。

en: Who shall separate us from the love of Christ? Shall tribulation, or distress, or persecution, or famine, or nakedness, or danger, or sword?
zh: 誰能使我們與基督的愛隔絕呢？是患難嗎？是困苦嗎？是迫害嗎？是飢餓嗎？是赤身露體嗎？是危險嗎？是刀劍嗎？

en: As it is written, "For your sake we are being killed all the day long; we are regarded as sheep to be slaughtered."
zh: 正如經上所記： “為你的緣故，我們終日面對死亡， 人看我們像待宰的羊。”

en: No, in all these things we are more than conquerors through him who loved us.
zh: 但靠著愛我們的那一位，我們在這一切事上就得勝有餘了。

en: For I am sure that neither death nor life, nor angels nor rulers, nor things present nor things to come, nor powers,
zh: 因為我深信：無論是死、是生，是天使、是掌權的，是現在的事，是將來的事，是有能力的，

en: nor height nor depth, nor anything else in all creation, will be able to separate us from the love of God in Christ Jesus our Lord.
zh: 是高天的、是深淵的，或是任何別的被造之物，都不能叫我們與 神的愛隔絕，這愛是在我們的主耶穌基督裡的。
